bibleVerse.full: Do not conform to the pattern of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind. Then you will be able to test and approve what God's will is — His good, pleasing and perfect will.
bibleVerse.tagline: Be transformed by the renewing of your mind.
sentences: Do not conform to the pattern of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind.
Then you will be able to test and approve what God's will is — His good, pleasing and perfect will.

venue.name: C.S.I St. Andrew's Church
venue.address: Gandhi Street, Guduvancheri, Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
venue.fullAddress: C.S.I St. Andrew's Church, Gandhi Street, Guduvancheri, Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

guidelines: The competitions are open to invited churches only.
Registration will be open from 8:00 AM to 9:00 AM.
Please arrive on time and adhere to the event schedule.
Cooperate with the ASCEND Volunteer Team and maintain proper decorum throughout the event.
Any inappropriate behavior or violation of the rules results in immediate disqualification.
The decisions of the Judges and the Organizing Committee will be final.
Participants must be between 18 and 35 years of age.
Please confirm your participation by July 19.
All online event submissions must be completed on or before August 7.

about.story: ASCEND is an annual inter-church youth event where churches come together to participate in various competitions, fellowship, worship, and spiritual growth. More than a gathering, it is a movement of young believers rising together in faith, unity, and purpose.

closing.headline: Transformation begins with one step.
closing.subtext:
RENEW isn't just our theme.
It's God's invitation to every heart.
